gt_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.driverId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T2.raceId = T1.raceId WHERE T1.name = 'Australian Grand Prix' AND T1.year = 2008 AND T2.time IS NOT NULL
pred_sql: SELECT COUNT(T2.driverId) FROM races AS T1 INNER JOIN circuits AS T3 ON T1.circuitId = T3.circuitId INNER JOIN results AS T2 ON T1.raceId = T2.raceId WHERE T1.year = 2008 AND T3.country = 'Australia' AND T2.time IS NOT NULL;
question: How many drivers managed to finish the race in the 2008 Australian Grand Prix?
